artPrompt: A pack of oversized mutant raccoons charging together over a toppled dumpster in foreshortened low-angle fury, lead beast snarling with too-clever eyes, claws raised toward the viewer. Murky-green fur matted with toxic runoff, rusted pipes and crumbling plant walls looming behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescence in their eyes, a trampling kinetic raid, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Raccoon Raiding Party
text:
Trample
When Raccoon Raiding Party enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 green Mutant Raccoon creature tokens. Each one immediately eats a snack off the table if there is one.
flavorText: They opened the dumpster, the cooler, AND the locked shed. Nobody taught them that. The water did.
